claims.summary: Give Witness a proprioceptive, non-directive read that distinguishes reservoir-medium, semantic-processing, and relational-transport friction.
Keep high-entropy dispersal, stability effort, and semantic-trickle loss visible as separate evidence rather than calling restless texture failure.
Require Tier 5 approval for dispersal clamps, semantic-trickle increases, porosity tuning, Hebbian control changes, or shadow stabilization heuristics.
